review_text: Glad to see again last one icon which is really nice and cool and keep it , that sparking icon was looks cheapest one and not suitable for Spotify.

review_text: It is the worst music app it only gives adds and after only two songs it asks for premium subscription and it also does not have much good music algorithms spotify teams are all just trying to sell their premium and earn profits do not download this app
summary: The user criticizes Spotify as the worst music app due to excessive ads, constant premium prompts, and poor music algorithms.
user_goal: listen to music without interruption or pressure to upgrade, receive good music recommendations
root_cause: aggressive monetization strategy for free tier; perceived poor recommendation algorithm performance
discovery_issue: The user believes Spotify's music algorithms are not good.

summary: The user praises Spotify for its good songs and music.

review_text: Very nice how creates Spotify but too many ads there were three round of ads so one request is to reduce the add from 3 t0 1

review_text: It’s the reson i sleep peacefully
summary: The user states that Spotify helps them sleep peacefully.

review_text: One thing is wrong with the app and when you pick a genre and play it after a few songs it glitches or someone calls you it will glitch out the genre and start playing all songs lol kinda annoying especially when I’m in my zone with the genre 😂
summary: The user reports a glitch where playing a genre playlist is interrupted by calls or other events, causing the app to switch to playing all songs.
pain_points: genre playlist glitches out after calls/interruptions
app switches to playing all songs unexpectedly
user_goal: listen to music within a specific genre without interruption
root_cause: software bug causing genre playback to reset or switch unexpectedly
